popularStory.headline: Yolande de Dreux (1212-1248)
popularStory.description:
Yolande de Dreux, née vers 1212/1213, morte en 1248, est la fille de Robert III, comte de Dreux, et d'Aénor, dame de Saint-Valery.

Elle épouse en 1229 Hugues IV (1213 † 1272), duc de Bourgogne, et eu …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Yolande of Brittany於1218年出生在法國艾-吉洛易德時，她的父親Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond32歲，母親Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany18歲。她和Count Hugh de Lusignan XI至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1272年10月10日在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特布迪維爾享年54歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可萊斯 索利尼艾雷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yolande of Brittany于1218年出生在法国艾-吉洛易德时，她的父亲Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond32岁，母亲Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany18岁。她和Count Hugh de Lusignan XI至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1272年10月10日在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫特布迪維爾享年54岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可萊斯 索利尼艾雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Yolande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Yolanda
meanings: Of uncertain origin. It is found in Old French as Yolande , of which this is a Latinate form. It may be ultimately of Germanic origin, but if so it has been altered beyond recognition. It is also sometimes identified with the name of St Jolenta ( d. 1298 ), daughter of the king of Hungary.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Brittany
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly North American: modern coinage, taken from the traditionally Celtic-speaking region of north-west France, known in medieval Latin as Britannia, because it was settled by refugees from Cornwall and Devon following the establishment of the Anglo-Saxon kingdom of Wessex. Its adoption as a given name has also been influenced by Britt , of which it is sometimes regarded as the full form. In recent years it has rapidly established itself as a popular name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Yolande of Brittany was born in 1218, in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France, her father, Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond, was 32 and her mother, Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany, was 18. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Count Hugh de Lusignan XI. She died on 10 October 1272, in Bouteville, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 54, and was buried in Les Sorinières, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yolande of Brittany est née en 1218, à Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France, son père, Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Count Hugh de Lusignan XI. Elle est décédée le 10 octobre 1272, à Bouteville, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Les Sorinières, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Yolande of Brittany 1218 in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond 32 und ihre Mutter Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany 18. Sie hatte mit Count Hugh de Lusignan XI mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Oktober 1272 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Bouteville, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich und wurde in Les Sorinières, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande of Brittany è nata il nel 1218 nel Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, sua padre, Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Count Hugh de Lusignan XI. Morì il 10 ottobre 1272, nel Bouteville, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Les Sorinières, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Yolande of Brittany(이)가 1218년 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 드레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Count Hugh de Lusignan XI(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1272년 10월 10일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처트 부테빌에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 레스 소리니e레스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande of Brittany nasceu em 1218, em Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, França, seu pai, Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Count Hugh de Lusignan XI. Ela faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1272, em Bouteville, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Les Sorinières, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yolande of Brittany родилась в 1218 г. в местности дреукс, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Count Hugh de Lusignan XI. Она умерла 10 октября 1272 г. в местности боутевилл, чарент, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности лесь сориниeресь, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.
